name: Asparagus Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the greens (spinach, romaine lettuce) in a large bowl. Break them into bite-size pieces.
2. Place the spinach and romaine lettuce in a plastic bag or lightly covered container. Store in the refrigerator for 4-6 hours or overnight to crisp up.
3. Wash the asparagus spears and cut into 2-inch pieces.
4. Shred the red cabbage just like you would for coleslaw; remove any tough pieces.
5. Just before serving, carefully pat the greens dry with a towel.
6. In the same bowl, add all ingredients and toss lightly to coat with Lemon French Dressing.
7. Each serving contains 1/2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE; CAL: 42.
